follow_actions.instruction: Go to https://www.instagram.com/theartofcharm/followers/. Scroll the followers dialog to load more. For each user shown that has a 'Follow' button (not 'Following'), like 1-2 of their recent posts, then follow them. Do 3 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each. Skip accounts with 10K+ followers or no posts.

Go to https://www.instagram.com/apollonia_ponti/followers/. Scroll the followers dialog to load more. For each user shown that has a 'Follow' button (not 'Following'), like 1-2 of their recent posts, then follow them. Do 3 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each. Skip accounts with 10K+ followers or no posts.

Go to https://www.instagram.com/sweet2elite/followers/. Scroll the followers dialog to load more. For each user shown that has a 'Follow' button (not 'Following'), like 1-2 of their recent posts, then follow them. Do 3 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each. Skip accounts with 10K+ followers or no posts.

Go to https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/datingover30/. Click on recent posts. For each post, like it, then visit the creator's profile. If they have under 10K followers and posted in the last 7 days, follow them. Do 5 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each.

Go to https://www.instagram.com/explore/tags/datingcoach/. Click on recent posts. For each post, like it, then visit the creator's profile. If they have under 10K followers and posted in the last 7 days, follow them. Do 5 follows, waiting 2-4 minutes between each.

unfollow_instruction: For each username in the unfollow list, go to their profile, click 'Following', then click 'Unfollow'. Wait 60-120 seconds between each. Unfollow these 5 accounts: life_with_emmariley, piper__dailyy, sambeliev, polishedprincesse, brenmarrick
